title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Tarakasura's sons plead with Tripura Sundari to protect them from Lord Shiva. Parvati and Shiva face off in the battle of Karma. Who will win?

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: In the war between Asuras and Shiva, as promised, the Goddess arrives. However, she faces a dilemma when the Asuras prepare to use the powerful Shivastra vertically.

title: Gunasundari
subTitle: Upon Abhimanyu's inquiry, Latika reveals that she is aware of the deal that he has made with Sajjan. However, Abhimanyu defends his actions and reveals the entire truth to her. Will he be able to clear the misunderstanding?

title: Gunasundari
subTitle: Abhimanyu and Latika run away from Sajjan and Kamini, as Abhimanyu wants to talk to Latika alone. Later, Abhimanyu seeks a promise from Latika to always help him with the academy irrespective of any problems in their relationship. Will Latika comply?

title: Gunasundari
subTitle: Abhimanyu affirms to register for a contest which may grant him money and his family some respect. Later, Daulatrao seems excited about a registration. Are Daulat and Abhimanyu thinking about the same contest?

title: Gunasundari
subTitle: While Latika and Abhimanyu prepare for the coming carnival, Daulatrao has a meeting with his dad regarding acquiring a certain land for a big business deal. What tricks does Daulatrao have up his sleeves?

title: Gunasundari
subTitle: With an upcoming annual competition, Abhimanyu has an opportunity to pay off his loan. Meanwhile, Daulatrao bullies capable participants to win the challenge. Will Abhimanyu take the opportunity and defeat Daulatrao?

title: Gunasundari
subTitle: Abhimanyu confronts Daulatrao for bullying his student Sunil, and Abhimanyu is challenged by Daulatrao to enroll in the competition. Meanwhile, Latika stands by Abhimanyu against Daulatrao. Will their bond magnify?

title: Gunasundari
subTitle: Sajjan is stuck between two choices and unable to make the right decision. However, he consults his father and gets into a long discussion. What left Sajjan perplexed?

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: Upon confronted by Janaki, Niranjan apologises for his betrayal and informs her that he has already met a lawyer to file for mutual divorce. While lawyer Nandana advises Janaki not to take a hasty decision, will Janaki go ahead with the divorce?

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: Rashmi blames herself for all the misery in Janaki's life. She informs Janaki that she hid the truth about Niranjan and that he is innocent. Having learnt the truth, will Janaki contemplate a reconciliation with Niranjan?

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: Feeling betrayed by her own mother, Janaki decides to divorce Niranjan and confronts Rashmi for hiding the truth. Chandu learns from Rashmi that Janaki and Niranjan have filed for divorce. What is Chandu planning to do with that information?

title: Manku Thimma
subTitle: A police officer is pursuing a secret organisation that targets wealthy individuals to scam their money. Thimma inadvertently aids him in locating one of the gangsters hiding in a rich man's home.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: While exiting CSP's house, Janaki runs into Madhukar. He congratulates Janaki for making the newspaper headlines and also apologises for speaking out of hand during their previous meeting.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: As the trial begins in the court, CSP presents his arguments in favour of Sanjana. During the hearing, he reveals how his client was affected by the cheating and requests the court to extend Varun Vaibhav's police custody for further investigation.

title: Papa Pandu
subTitle: Pandu informs the family about Srimati's transformation into Jaya, but they dismiss his claims. Subsequently, Srimati requests Pandu to search for the Guruji who cursed her.

title: Papa Pandu
subTitle: Srihari inadvertently locks Pandu on the balcony. Later, Srimati receives an unusual phone call from a thief alleging Pandu's accident.

title: Jhansi Ki Rani
subTitle: Gangadhar sends gifts to courtesan Moti Bai while an astrologer makes a mistake with horoscopes while tensions rise at a mela between locals and British horsemen.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: Sheela Bhushan meets her mentor CSP and shares her happiness of meeting him after a long time. While recollecting old memories, she expresses regret for being the opposing lawyer in the Varun Vaibhav case.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: Janaki meets Mythri Mahananda and notices her worried look. When Janaki enquires her about it, Mythri confesses to finding her childhood photograph in an ashram requests Janaki's help in finding her biological parents.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Parvati advises Lord Shiva to strike Tripura Sundari since she is a form of Adi Shakthi, but he refuses. Later, the Asuras seize the chance and dart the Shivastra at Lord Shiva.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Kartikeya is devastated as Yama Dev arrives to take his mother's soul. In desperation, he implores Lord Shiva to save her life. How will Lord Shiva respond in this critical moment?

title: Chakori
subTitle: Chakor wants to escape from school with Bhuvan and heads to Azadganj by keeping Arjun distracted, so that they do not get caught.

title: Chakori
subTitle: When Aditya demands to talk to Chakor to congratulate her, Arjun realises that Bhuwan and Chakor are nowhere to be seen. Chakor consoles Bhuwan and tells him that they have to save Imli at any cost.

title: Chakori
subTitle: Ishwar and Aabha confront Chakor and try to stop her from going back to her father. However, she convinces them to let her go.

title: Chakori
subTitle: Kasturi begs Tejaswini to spare Imli from bonded labour. Later, Chakori arrives at the mansion and sees a shocking sight.

title: Chakori
subTitle: When Ishwar breaks some unexpected news, Kamalnarayan grows furious. Soon, Kamalnarayan instructs his gunmen to attack Ishwar and Aabha.

title: Chakori
subTitle: Chakor, a young girl, who was kept as a collateral for money before she was born grows up into a free-spirited athlete. She raises her voice against the system of bonded labour in her village.

subTitle: Chandu Bargi overhears Janaki asking Chanchala for Niranjan's photo from her cell phone. Upon realising that it is meant to be sent to CSP, he quickly deletes all the photos from Chanchala's phone before they can be sent.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: Janaki's efforts to become self-reliant finally pay off as she lands herself a job opportunity. With Niranjan being questioned about his marriage by his mother, will he be forced to come clean now?

subTitle: Tarakasura, consumed by worry for his sons, resolves to confront Lord Shiva in a desperate attempt to save them. However, Lord Shiva, wielding his divine powers, takes action by launching Tarakasura's sons into space and arranging them as targets.
